# UiHost.IsUiDisplayMode method

Returns `true` when *value* is one of the three defined display modes (spec §26.5.1).

```csharp
public static bool IsUiDisplayMode(string? value)
```

| value | The candidate display-mode string. |

## Return Value

`true` when defined.
